/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libsemba-components.a "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/anisotropic.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/borderscpml.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/bordersmur.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/bordersother.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/electricdispersive.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/magneticdispersive.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/nodalsources.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/planewaves.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/pml_bodies.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/maloney_nostoch.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/lumped.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/dmma_thin_slot.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_main_pub/farfield.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_wires_pub/wires.F90.o" "CMakeFiles/semba-components.dir/src_wires_pub/wires_mtln.F90.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libsemba-components.a
